title: Add PES RosehipV1: Precision Error Signal + frontier stack
author: Tetrahedroned

data.description: Lightweight inter-layer correction module inspired by the biological Rosehip neuron.
Included as part of the frontier stack; exact role not specified in the text.
Included as part of the frontier stack; exact role not specified in the text.
Uses LeakyReLU squared activation (LeakyReLU²) as part of the frontier stack.

novel_contributions: PES (Precision Error Signal) inter-layer correction module
Frontier stack combining XSA, VRL, EMA, and LeakyReLU²
Training dynamics documentation in the README
